title: Appellate Quarterly - January 2024
content:
## Appellate Quarterly - January 2024
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Appellate Litigation Group as we discuss appeals of importance to the Canadian business community during the last quarter. Each session brings you up-to-date on recent appellate developments across Canada. Topics to be discussed this quarter include:
- Supreme Court of Canada: Good faith in contracts and the duty to inform
- Federal: Whether PIPEDA applies to news articles identified through search engine results
- Ontario/Atlantic: The oppression remedy and analysis of reasonable expectations
- Quebec: The threshold for authorization of a class action in Québec
- Western Canada: BC Court of Appeal addresses previously unsettled questions about the role of a company in oppression claims and other shareholder disputes
Speakers include: Brandon Kain , Kosta Kalogiros , Richard Lizius , Isabelle Vendette , Patrick Williams
Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
CPD accreditation will be confirmed in early 2024.
For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
1:00 p.m. – 2:30 p.m. (ET) 11:00 a.m. – 12:30 p.m. (MT) 10:00 a.m. – 11:30 a.m. (PT)
